197227.name: Indicator:Current health expenditure (CHE) per capita in PPP int$
197227.description:
Rationale: This indicator calculates the average expenditure on health per person in comparable currency including the purchasing power of national currencies against USD. It contributes to understand the health expenditure relative to the population size facilitating international comparison.

Definition: Per capita current expenditures on health expressed in respective currency - international Purchasing Power Parity (PPP) dollar

Method of measurement: CHE/Population

Method of estimation: -
197227.datasetName: Global Health Observatory - World Health Organization (2021.12)
